decisions.decision: Treat verification as a worktree-local run of `pnpm --dir frontend install` followed by the full `pnpm --dir frontend test` script, with `pnpm --dir frontend build` kept outside the blocking acceptance path for this task.
alternatives_rejected: Require `pnpm --dir frontend build` to pass before calling the task complete

decisions.decision: Use the CI-aligned runtime baseline of Node 22 plus globally installed pnpm and record the runtime versions used in the worktree before running install and test commands.
alternatives_rejected: Treat the host default Node version as authoritative without checking it
Introduce a new repo-local Node or pnpm pin as part of this verification task

decisions.decision: Run the frontend suite self-contained in the worktree without starting backend services, because the checked-in Vitest setup is jsdom-based and mocks API boundaries.
alternatives_rejected: Start the backend before every frontend test run
Block verification on adding extra local service bootstrap steps

decisions.decision: Treat install-time lockfile drift or post-install test failures as validation findings to document explicitly, and report results as executed commands, per-test-file outcomes, and the overall Vitest summary instead of widening the task into unrelated frontend remediation.
alternatives_rejected: Silently commit dependency drift created by `pnpm install`
Expand the task into open-ended debugging if the suite still fails after a clean install
Report only a single pass/fail line without suite-level detail

steps.task: Capture the worktree baseline for frontend verification: confirm the current git state, inspect the checked-in frontend test suite surface, and record the Node and pnpm versions that will be used.

Run `pnpm --dir frontend install` in this worktree, then inspect whether tracked frontend artifacts such as `frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml` changed so dependency drift is reported instead of silently absorbed.
Run the full `pnpm --dir frontend test` suite without starting backend services and capture the command output needed for per-test-file and overall Vitest reporting.
Write the validation artifact with the exact commands, runtime context, suite results, and any reproducible drift or failure details, then stage and commit the task outputs.
